title: Tunable topological Dirac surface states and van Hove singularities in kagome metal GdV <sub>6</sub> Sn <sub>6</sub>

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports experimental observation and electrostatic tuning of topological Dirac surface states and van Hove singularities in the kagome metal GdV6Sn6, linking bulk topology, magnetism, and surface electronic structure.
